name: Baked Beans with a Zing
directions: In medium pan combine all ingredients.
Cook at medium heat until heated through (about 15 min.) and flavors have blended.

name: Sylvia's Easy Baked Beans
directions: Mix all ingredients together except for the bacon strips.
Pour into a 9" square glass casserole (sprayed with nonstick baking spray) laying bacon strips on top if desired (I omit the bacon).
Bake in a preheated 350 F oven for 30-45 minutes.

name: Baked Beans Dressed for Dinner
directions: In a medium saucepan over medium heat, heat oil and then cook onion and green pepper, stirring frequently, until tender.
If necessary, add a bit of water or broth so it doesn't stick.
Stir in beans and drained pineapple.
In a small bowl, stir cornstarch into reserve pineapple juice.
Add to saucepan.
Add spices.
Cook, stirring, until it boils.
Cook and stir 1 minuter longer.

name: Mom's famous Baked Beans
directions: Preheat oven to 375.
Mix first 8 ingredients, lay kielbasa slices on top.
Bake for 1 hour.

name: Julie's Kickin Baked Beans
directions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Remove 6 slices of bacon from pound.
Chop onion.
Dice bacon remaining bacon.
Brown bacon and onion with ground beef.
Give it a good drain.
Fry 6 slices of bacon.
In a bowl combine all ingredients except 6 slices of bacon.
Pour into a 2 quart casserole dish (sprayed with Pam).
Top with remaining bacon.
Bake for 20 minutes.

name: New Mexican Chili Bean Salad
directions: Make dressing: Combine vinegar, oil, spices.
Rinse beans and corn. Drain well.
Mix beans and corn with green onion, cilantro, bell pepper, green chilies, and dressing.
Cover and chill at least 1 hour or until next day, stirring occasionally.

name: Baked Beans (Western Style)
directions: Fry bacon until crispy, allow to cool then break into pieces, add to pork & beans.
Add all remaining ingredints to the pork & bean mixture, stir and bake for 20 minutes at 350.

name: Bacon Brown Sugar Baked Beans
directions: Drain the beans (do NOT rinse). (If you are baking the beans in the oven, don't drain as much-or not at all.).
Mix in all other ingredients except bacon.
If you're in a hurry, microwave for 2 minutes & skip the bacon. (This is my preferred method.).
Stir and serve.
Otherwise, put bacon on top and bake in a 350 degree F oven for 45 minutes.
Note: all amounts are approximate. Adjust to your taste.

name: Easy Baked Beans
directions: Put the beans in pot, stir in the ketchup and mustard and heat over medium heat until warm.
Meanwhile, brown the bacon and onion in a skillet, drain the grease, and then add to the beans.
Heat through and serve.

name: BBQ Butter Beans
directions: Mix all except for bacon in bowl and put in greased dish.  Sprinkle with bacon and bake,
uncovered, at 350 for 1 ½ hours.

name: Traditional Appalachian Baked Beans
directions: Mix all but bacon together and pour into a 9" x 13" casserole dish, (sprayed with PAM).
Lay bacon strips on top.
Cover with aluminum foil.
Bake in a pre-heated 400-degree F. oven for 45 minutes.
Reduce heat to 350-degrees F. and bake UNCOVERED until beans are bubbly and bacon crisps up a bit (about 45 minutes).

name: Baked Beans
directions: Cook onion and bacon together until onion is soft.
Mix everything together and put into a 9x13 pan.
Bake at 350 for 40-45 minute.

name: American-Style Baked Beans
directions: Preheat oven to 150 degrees Celsius.
Mix all ingredients in a baking dish.
Bake uncovered for 2 hours, stirring occassionally to stop the top from caramelising too much.

name: Wicked Baked Beans
directions: Crisp bacon in a skillet, remove, leaving grease in skillet.
Saute' bell pepper, jalapeno,and onion until tender.
Combine all ingredients.  If mixture looks drier than desired, add additional ketchup.
Pour into a 12x9 aluminum baking pan, or deep 9x9.(We like to use disposables).
Smoke @ 225*-250* for 2 1/2 hours uncovered.
Remove to oven and bake 1 hour @ 350*, or until beans reach a temp of 160*.
Note: Between the peppers and the mustard, these beans are on the warm side.  If desired, adjust the heat up or down with peppers, and mustard.

name: Baked Beans  ( Using Can of Pork and Beans)
directions: Brown bacon and onion.
Place beans in casserole dish with other ingredients.
Add bacon and onions.
Bake 25 min in 300 oven.

similar.name: Quick Baked Beans in a Pinch

name: Crazy Beans
directions: Saute ground beef, bacon, and onion in a large skillet or saucepan until meat is cooked throughly.
Drain.
Add ketchup, brown sugar and vinegar and mix well.
Then add pork and beans, butter beans and red kidney beans and mix well.
Heat throughly.
Transfer to large baking dish.
Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Add tender loving care.

similar.name: Quick Baked Beans in a Pinch

name: Vegetarian White Chili (Meat Op.)
directions: In a large sauce pan saute onion and garlic in oil until tender.
Add spices.
Add beans, Rotel, broth, and hot sauce.
Bring to a boil and simmer for one hour.
Stir in sour cream and cheese. Serve with tortilla chips.
Enjoy!
Chef's note: If desired, substitute vegetable broth with chicken broth and add 1 pound of cooked, shredded chicken before simmering. I assure you, it's wonderful without the meat, though.
Also, if you want to cut down on the spice, leave out the hot sauce.

name: Stove Top Bean Bake
directions: Cook bacon and onion over low heat till bacon is crispy and onion is tender in big pot.
Stir in all other ingredients.
Simmer on stove top for 20-30 minutes till sauce is thickened, stirring often.

similar.name: Quick Baked Beans in a Pinch

name: Diane's Baked Beans
directions: Fry the bacon (I nuke it); crumble and reserve 3 tablespoons grease.
Cook the chopped onion in the grease.
Mix the cooked onion, pork and beans, ketchup, mustard, brown sugar, and worcestershire.
Pour into a 1 1/2 quart baking dish, and bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
Top with crumbled bacon and cook for 15 more minutes.

name: Baked Beans for Two
directions: Combine all ingredients in an ungreased 1-quart baking dish.
Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 30-40 minutes.

name: Simple Baked Beans
directions: In a skillet, saute bacon and onion.  Drain.
In a mixing bowl, combine bacon and onion with remaining ingredients.  Mix well, making sure to mash any brown sugar lumps.
Pour the mixture into an 8x8-inch baking dish and bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.

name: Super Awesome Baked Beans
directions: In a bowl, combine HALF of the chopped BACON and the french fried onions.  Set aside.
In a greased 13x9 casserole dish, combine remaining ingredients and mix well.  (Taste mixture -- you might want more brown sugar or salt/pepper).
Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Sprinkle french fried onion and bacon mixture all over beans.  Return to oven and bake 5-10 minutes until golden brown.

name: Saucy Baked Beans - Paula Deen
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.  Lightly grease a 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
Spoon into prepared baking dish and bake 45-50 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.

name: Linda's Baked Beans
directions: Mix all ingredients in a baking dish.
Bake at 350, for 1 hr., or until thickened.
Remove, and let set about 15 minutes.
They will continue to thicken so do not over bake.

name: Bang up Baked Beans
directions: Mix together all ingredients and put in a 8x8-inch baking dish.
Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.

name: Vegetarian Chili
directions: Rinse all beans to remove salt and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot.  Add garlic and onion and saute until onions are opaque.
Add all remaining ingredigents and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes (or longer) until thick.

name: Chili Cookoff Winner
directions: Combine all ingredients in a crock pot or a 4 quart (or larger) pot on the stove.
Cook over medium heat (or high if using a crock pot) until hot.

name: Coca-Cola Baked Beans
directions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
In a large bowl, combine the beans, onion, sugar, ketchup, Coke, dry mustard, and salt and pepper; stir till well blended.  Scrape the mixture into a large, shallow baking dish.
Drape the bacon slices evenly over the top and bake uncovered till the bacon is thoroughly cooked and the beans are bubbling, 1 to 1 1/4 hours.

name: Spicy Baked Beans
directions: If cooking on stove top, saute onion and pepper until tender.
Place all ingredients in pan and heat over low till flavors blend, about 20 minutes.
If cooking in crock pot place all ingredients in crock pot and cook on low 4 hours.

name: Mom's Baked Beans
directions: preheat oven 350.
cook bacon set aside to cool then crumble.
sate' onion and bell peppers together. Till soft.
mix together vegetables, beans, molasses, ketchup, and mustard.
Place in a baking pan.
Cover with foil and bake at 350 for 1 hour.
remove sprinkle with bacon.
return to oven at 175 for 30 or to keep warm.

name: Country Bean BBQ
directions: Drain lima beans; reserve 1/2 c liquid. In large skillet cook bacon until browned. Drain all but 1 tablespoons bacon fat from skillet. Add onion, celery and garlic; cook 5 minutes or until tender.
Stir in ketchup, lima beans, reserved lima bean liquid and kidney beans; mix gently. Simmer uncovered 20 minutes; stir occasionally. Stir in Tabasco sauce.

name: Mimi's Baked Beans
directions: In a small frying pan, saute bacon cubes and onion until lightly browned.
In a large casserole dish, add the canned beans, onion, bacon and remaining ingredients. Stir together, mixing well.
Bake in oven at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

similar.name: Quick Baked Beans in a Pinch

name: Southwestern White Chili
directions: In slow cooker, place all ingredients except cheese.  Stir to combine.
Cover and cook on low heat for 7 - 8 hours or on high heat for 3 1/2 - 4 hours.
Stir in cheese until melted.

name: Moms Easy Baked Beans
directions: Simple!
Mix all ingredients.
Cut up bacon in 1 inch pieces and top the mixture.
Bake at 325 for 2 hrs or until cooked down and bacon is fully cooked.
Note! you can also add some BBQ sauce to change it up.
Enjoy!

name: Glorified Beans
directions: Reserve 1/4 cheese.
Mix all ingredients together (except the 1/4 cheese).
Pour mixture in baking dish.
Bake at 250 for 25 minutes (or longer depending on how saucy or thickened you like your beans).
Add 1/4 cheese.
Bake 10 minutes more.

name: Spiked Baked Beans
directions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat until shimmering. Saute onions in oil until soft and translucent, 3-5 minutes. Add beans, ketchup, mustard, worcestershire sauce, ground mustard and brown sugar, if using. Bring to a simmer and cook 10 minutes, stirring often.

name: Baked Beans - Cajun Style
directions: Fry the bacon in a large frying pan until crisp.   Let cool, then crumble the bacon, then mix all the ingredients together well except for the beans, then add beans and mix gently, so as not to mash up the beans.  Precooked, crumbled bacon bits can be substituted for the freshly cooked bacon.

An alternative to bacon is to use smoked ham.  Slice ham into 1/8 inch cubes and place in a mixing bowl.  Sprinkle the ham with a mixture of one-quarter cup brown sugar and one-quarter cup white sugar, mix until the ham is well coated, then brown ham in a frying pan until the sugars caramelize and begin to turn brown/black.  Then mix all ingredients except the beans together, then add beans and mix gently, so as to not mash up the beans.

Pour bean mixture into a 10 x 10 inch baking dish, cover with tin foil and bake at 300 degrees for 30 minutes or longer, until bubbling well around the edges of the baking dish, then remove tin foil, and broil at 400 degrees 5 to 10 minutes, until top browns/blackens slightly.  This browning/blackening adds a very good caramelized flavor to the dish, and does not taste burned at all.
This makes a mild to medium spicy recipe, to make a very mild recipe, use only 1/4 teaspoon each of the three peppers.

name: Simply Irresistable Baked Beans
directions: Brown sausage and onion.
Mix together with beans.
Add mustard (to taste) and molasses.
Spread in a 9 X 13 inch pan.
Cover beans with sliced apples.
Sprinkle with brown sugar (to taste).
Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

name: Barbecue Baked Beans
directions: Drain beans and discard sauce.
Mix all ingredients but the bacon, which can be raw or half-cooked in the microwave.
Pour beans into 13x9 pan and arrange sliced bacon on top of beans.
Bake at 350 degrees for an hour.

name: Easy Baked Beans
directions: Pour the pork & beans into a 3/4 quart or 1 quart casserole dish.  Stir in the brown sugar and mustard.
Then add the molasses and Worcestershire sauce and stir until mixed well.
Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minute to 1 hour.  You may need to cover the dish with aluminum foil during the second half of the cooking time.

name: Hawaiian Baked Beans!
directions: Combine all ingrerdients in a 2 quart microwave safe bowl. Cover and buzz 11-13 minutes, until it bubblesd.Stir a couple of times during cooking.
I put a bottle of Tabasco sauce on the table for those that like it hot! :-).

name: Vegetarian Lentil Chili
directions: In a large pot, combine undrained tomatoes, rinsed and drained beans, 3 cups water, green peppers, onions, dry lentils, chili powder, and garlic powder.
Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
Simmer, covered, 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in tomato sauce, tomato paste, and 1/8 tsp black pepper; heat through.
Serve with cheese and tortilla chips, if desired.

name: Cindy's Best Baked Beans
directions: Mix all ingredients into a large bowl except for the bacon.
Put into a greased casserole or oven safe bowl.
Cut bacon in half and lay on top.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste on top.
Bake 350 degrees for 1 1/2 hours or until the consistency you like.
Do not cook so long that the beans dry out.

name: Mom's Baked Beans
directions: Mix all together.
Pour into 8x8 oven safe dish.
Lay bacon across the top of beans.
Bake at 350 for 1 hour.

name: Aj's Best Baked Beans
directions: Preheat oven to 375.

Saute the bacon til brown, then drain the bacon, reserving some of the drippings. Add your red onion and green pepper til onion is translucent and both are tender. Drain off drippings. Drain the juices from one can of pork and beans, then empty contents of both cans into baking dish. Mix beans with the fried onion, bacon bits, and green pepper. Add mustard, BBQ sauces, thai chili sauce, brown sugar, and cajun seasoning. Mix well. Bake for 40 minutes.

name: Crock-Pot Baked Beans
directions: Combine everything in the slow cooker.
Cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.

similar.name: Baked Beans  ( Using Can of Pork and Beans)

name: Alice's Baked Beans
directions: pre heat oven to 375. Cut raw bacon into one 1/2 inch chunks and reserve a little for the top. Mix everything together, put a little bacon on top and cook at 375 until done, about 1 hour.

name: Quick Baked Beans in a Pinch
directions: Saute onion and bacon until bacon is crisp (10 min or so). Drain most of the fat (but not all).
Add beans (not drained) and remaining ingredients. Bring to simmer, keep on heat at least 20 min, but much longer will be fine too. If it starts to get too thick, add water or stock.
